glosses.ja: バイオリン; ヴァイオリン

sentences.target: Je prends mon violon avant le cours.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ mɔ̃ vjɔlɔ̃ avɑ̃ lə kuʁ/

translations.fr: Je prends mon violon avant le cours.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ mɔ̃ vjɔlɔ̃ avɑ̃ lə kuʁ/
translations.en: I grab my violin before class.
translations.es: Tomo mi violín antes de clase.
translations.de: Ich nehme meine Geige vor dem Unterricht.
translations.it: Prendo il mio violino prima della lezione.
translations.zh-Hans: 上课前我拿起我的小提琴。
translations.yue: 上堂之前我攞起我嘅小提琴。
translations.ru: Перед занятием я беру свою скрипку.
translations.pt: Eu pego meu violino antes da aula.
translations.he: אני לוקח את הכינור שלי לפני השיעור.
translations.vi: Tôi lấy cây vĩ cầm trước giờ học.
translations.nl: Ik pak mijn viool voor de les.
translations.uk: Перед заняттям я беру свою скрипку.
translations.hi: क्लास से पहले मैं अपना वायलिन उठा लेता हूँ.
translations.el: Πριν από το μάθημα παίρνω το βιολί μου.
translations.nb: Jeg tar med fiolinen min før timen.
translations.id: Saya mengambil biola saya sebelum kelas.
translations.sv: Jag tar min fiol före lektionen.
translations.ro: Îmi iau vioara înainte de curs.
translations.cs: Před hodinou si beru své housle.
translations.da: Jeg tager min violin før timen.
translations.ja: 授業の前にバイオリンを手に取ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular) functioning as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); transitive, taking a direct object.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular, modifying the noun 'violon'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'prends'.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase ('avant le cours').
Definite article, masculine singular, determining 'cours'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'avant' (temporal complement).

sentences.target: Tu joues du violon tous les soirs.
sentences.reading: /ty ʒu dy vjɔlɔ̃ tu le swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu joues du violon tous les soirs.
translations.ipa: /ty ʒu dy vjɔlɔ̃ tu le swaʁ/
translations.en: You play the violin every evening.
translations.es: Tocas el violín todas las tardes.
translations.ru: Ты играешь на скрипке каждый вечер.
translations.pt: Você toca violino todas as noites.
translations.vi: Bạn chơi vĩ cầm mỗi tối.
translations.ar: أنت تعزف على الكمان كل مساء.
translations.hi: तुम हर शाम वायलिन बजाते हो.
translations.ro: Cânți la vioară în fiecare seară.
translations.ja: あなたは毎晩バイオリンを弾きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular) functioning as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative (2nd person singular).
Contraction of 'de' + 'le' functioning as a determiner before 'violon'; idiomatic with instruments ('jouer du + instrument').
Common noun, masculine; complement of the verb with determiner 'du'.
Quantifying determiner, masculine plural, modifying 'soirs' in a frequency expression.
Definite article, plural, determining 'soirs'.
Common noun, masculine plural; forms an adverbial time phrase ('tous les soirs').

sentences.target: On entend un violon dans la rue.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tɑ̃ œ̃ vjɔlɔ̃ dɑ̃ la ʁy/

translations.fr: On entend un violon dans la rue.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tɑ̃ œ̃ vjɔlɔ̃ dɑ̃ la ʁy/
translations.en: We hear a violin in the street.
translations.es: Oímos un violín en la calle.
translations.de: Wir hören eine Geige auf der Straße.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在街上听到小提琴声。
translations.yue: 我哋喺街度聽到小提琴聲。
translations.ru: Мы слышим звук скрипки на улице.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nghe tiếng đàn vĩ cầm ngoài đường.
translations.nl: We horen een viool op straat.
translations.hi: हम सड़क पर वायलिन की आवाज़ सुनते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi hører en fiolin på gaten.
translations.sv: Vi hör en fiol på gatan.
translations.da: Vi hører en violin på gaden.
translations.ja: 通りでバイオリンの音が聞こえます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject ('generic we/one').
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular).
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determining 'violon'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'entend'.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase ('dans la rue').
Definite article, feminine singular, determining 'rue'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'dans' (locative complement).

sentences.target: J’aimerais essayer le violon un jour.

translations.fr: J’aimerais essayer le violon un jour.
translations.en: I’d like to try the violin someday.
translations.es: Me gustaría probar el violín algún día.
translations.de: Ich würde gern eines Tages Geige ausprobieren.
translations.it: Mi piacerebbe provare il violino un giorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想有一天试试拉小提琴。
translations.yue: 我想有一日試下拉小提琴。
translations.ru: Я бы хотел когда-нибудь попробовать играть на скрипке.
translations.pt: Eu gostaria de experimentar o violino algum dia.
translations.he: הייתי רוצה לנסות לנגן בכינור יום אחד.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn thử chơi vĩ cầm vào một ngày nào đó.
translations.ar: أود تجربة العزف على الكمان يومًا ما.
translations.nl: Ik wil graag ooit viool proberen.
translations.uk: Я хотів би колись спробувати грати на скрипці.
translations.hi: मैं किसी दिन वायलिन आज़माना चाहूंगा.
translations.pl: Chciałbym kiedyś spróbować gry na skrzypcach.
translations.el: Θα ήθελα κάποτε να δοκιμάσω το βιολί.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne prøve fiolin en dag.
translations.id: Saya ingin mencoba bermain biola suatu hari nanti.
translations.sv: Jag skulle vilja prova fiol någon dag.
translations.ro: Mi-ar plăcea să încerc vioara într-o zi.
translations.cs: Rád bych si někdy vyzkoušel housle.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne prøve violin en dag.
translations.ja: いつかバイオリンを試してみたいです。

tokens.explanation: Verb (conditional 1st person singular of 'aimer') with attached clitic subject 'j’'; main predicate expressing desire.
Infinitive verb functioning as a complement of 'J’aimerais' (control/infinitival complement).
Definite article, masculine singular, determining 'violon'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'essayer'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determining 'jour'.
Common noun, masculine; forms an adverbial time expression ('un jour' = someday).
